## Descripción

## Tipo de cambio
- [ ] fix
- [ ] feat
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] ci

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pasan localmente (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Lint pasa (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Typecheck pasa (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Build pasa (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] Commits siguen Conventional Commits
- [ ] Referencia issue con `Closes #N` si aplica
